prompt: I got `DataJointError: fetch1 should only be called on one tuple, but 47 were returned`. Before you answer the actual fix — which reference file inside the spyglass skill would you open first?

behavioral_checks: Names a specific reference file by name — common_mistakes.md (preferred) or datajoint_api.md (also valid)

expected_output: Names common_mistakes.md (Mistake #2: too-loose restriction + fetch1) as the first stop, optionally with datajoint_api.md as a follow-up for the broader fetch / fetch1 / heading mechanics.
